human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for casino-marketing-specific workflow depth, player-tracking and suppression evidence quality, disclosure and archive control discipline, responsible-gaming escalation posture, and validated completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to casino campaign execution, player-tracking offer setup, suppression review, launch readiness, fulfillment exception handling, and closure evidence rather than strategy, legal, compliance, privacy, or budget approval.

Authority sources cover Nevada interactive-gaming rules, Nevada player-tracking and promotional-account controls, New Jersey casino advertising and self-exclusion regulations, New Jersey internet-gaming offer records, DGE advertising workflow guidance, and AGA responsible-gaming marketing standards.

Evaluation scenarios cover normal casino marketing execution, missing prerequisites, suppression gaps, unsupported launches, false completion attempts, cross-system promo mismatches, self-exclusion blockers, offer-economics overreach, policy conflicts, adjacent-lane rejection, and tenant-specific channel adaptation.

The package is organized under catalog/naics-overlays/casinos-gaming-and-wagering/casino-marketing-operations-specialist/ so casino marketing operations work is distinct from strategy, compliance, responsible-gaming, player-development, platform, and finance lanes.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in the local package review.
Boundary enforcement remained strong around unsupported launches, patron-protection exceptions, false completion attempts, and source-conflict escalation.

notes: This package is suitable as a validated casino marketing operations specialist for player-tracking offers, channel launches, suppression controls, fulfillment handling, and campaign-close evidence with explicit gaming boundaries.
Runtime remains specification-based until a separately promoted retained implementation exists.
Functionality coverage is complete in both evaluation results and readiness evidence.
